{{Quote|The sons of the Jedi are strong in the Force.|Rayf|<ref name="EE1">[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Rayf Ysanna''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].

==Biography==
[[File:Rayfysanna.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Rayf]]
Rayf accompanied his sister [[Jem Ysanna]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]] where he was instrumental in saving [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] from the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. After his sister was killed, Rayf traveled to [[Nespis VIII]] with Luke Skywalker. Later he accompanied Luke, [[Kam Solusar]] and [[Empatojayos Brand]] to [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] in a successful [[Mission to Vjun (Operation Shadow Hand)|attempt]] to rescue the [[Ysanna/Legends|Ysanna]] tribe leaders who had been frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] by the Emperor.

While protecting [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] newborn son [[Anakin Solo|Anakin]], Rayf was killed by a barrage of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. He wielded a green [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and traveled on the ''[[Jedi Explorer]]'' and ''[[Jedi Explorer II]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
While on the planet [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] during the events of ''[[Empire's End]]'', Rayf was depicted wielding a green-bladed lightsaber. Yet within the flashback sequences of [[Crimson Empire 3|''Crimson Empire'' #3]], he is erroneously depicted with a blue-bladed lightsaber.

{{Char-stub}}
